visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim, a male main character, stands in a brightly lit studio environment. He wears a grey and white plaid newsboy cap, gold-rimmed glasses, and a light blue long-sleeved sweater. He is highly active, using frequent hand gestures and pointing towards the camera as he speaks. The background is a clean, neutral grey with a distinctive red border and a white brand banner at the top left. (2) The scene cuts to a young woman lying in a dark bedroom at night, her face illuminated by the bright blue glow of her smartphone. She is resting on a grey pillow under a patterned duvet. (3) A cartoon graphic of a male scientist with glasses and messy hair appears in a laboratory setting, holding a paper. This is followed by an animation of two green, angry-faced bacteria cells floating on a light green background. (4) A series of illustrative clips follow: a close-up of a toilet seat covered in dark stains under a harsh blue light, a high-detail close-up of a person's skin with numerous sweat droplets, and a bright sunny bedroom with white pillows and a yellow duvet. (5) A microscopic CGI animation shows various orange and pink bacteria or virus particles floating in a dark fluid. (6) Tim returns to the studio setting, continuing his energetic speech. (7) A final scene shows a woman sleeping in a bed from an overhead angle. Her hand is resting next to a smartphone placed directly on the mattress, alongside a teddy bear with a red bow. The lighting is soft and domestic.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim, a middle-aged male with glasses and a newsboy cap, introduces the topic while standing in a brightly lit indoor room. He wears a pink shirt with a green Roots brand logo. He holds up a blue iPhone, transitioning the focus from himself to the device's screen. (2) The video transitions to a vertical screen recording of the iPhone interface. The narrator navigates the home screen, showing various app icons and widgets like weather and calendar. He pulls down the control center, revealing a new translucent, Liquid Glass design with various toggles and controls. (3) The interface moves to the Photos app, which is divided into Library and Collections tabs. The Library shows a grid of personal photos including food, selfies, and travel shots. The Collections tab displays organized categories such as Memories, Pinned, and Albums with a clean, modern layout. (4) The screen switches to the Camera app's photo mode, focusing on a silver Proud Source water bottle. An upwards swipe gesture brings up a semi-transparent settings menu containing options for flash, live photos, timer, exposure, styles, and aspect ratio, showing a streamlined user interface. (5) The camera mode shifts from Photo to Video. The top bar displays resolution and frame rate settings like HD 30. Another swipe reveals video-specific settings including an Action mode toggle. Tapping the resolution text opens a new selection overlay for switching between 4K and 60fps. (6) The navigation returns to the home screen briefly before pulling down the notification center from the top left. The notifications are presented as translucent cards over a heavily blurred background, consistent with the Liquid Glass design language discussed earlier in the presentation. (7) The browser Safari is opened, displaying a website with food listings. The narrator demonstrates the updated tab management system, showing how new tabs can be added and how the layout has been optimized for better visibility and a more comprehensive user experience on the screen. (8) The video returns to a close-up shot of Tim as he concludes his presentation. He speaks directly to the camera with expressive facial gestures and uses his hand to emphasize his point, finally giving a thumbs-up motion to encourage viewers to stay tuned for more updates.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking immediately with crisp articulation and an animated tone. The narrator's voice maintains a high pitch variability, rising and falling to emphasize adjectives like 'classic' and 'representative.' The BGM continues without pause, providing a rhythmic framework for the rapid-fire speech. (3) Two distinct percussive 'tap' sounds are heard as the narrator demonstrates the headphone's touch controls. These sounds have a sharp transient profile and short decay. The music remains at a consistent volume, sitting comfortably behind the vocal signal. (4) Mechanical 'click' and 'latch' sounds occur as the narrator handles various leather accessories, such as the Airtag holder and card wallet. These incidental sounds are well-integrated into the mix. A 'ding' sound effect highlights the appearance of variety text on screen. (5) The narrator concludes his review with a final positive summary. The BGM maintains its upbeat energy until the very end, where the track fades out quickly along with the narrator's final words. The overall audio design is dense but clear, with a high signal-to-noise ratio.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright indoor studio where a middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a blue t-shirt with a white dog logo is seated behind a white desk. He holds a small black DJI Mic transmitter in his right hand, displaying it to the camera against a plain white background. (2) A close-up shot transitions to an open grey hardshell carrying case for the DJI Mic 3 system. Inside, the receiver with an OLED screen is nestled between two square transmitters, with two grey furry windshields and a USB-C cable visible. A grey fabric storage pouch sits beneath the case on a white surface. (3) A black digital scale is shown in a top-down view. A hand places a single black transmitter on the center of the scale, and the red LED display shows the weight as 16.4 grams. (4) The camera focuses closely on the man's hands as he demonstrates a magnetic back clip on the transmitter. He pulls a circular magnetic disc away from the black plastic body of the mic and snaps it back on, showing the red record button on the side. (5) Multiple close-up screen captures of the receiver's touchscreen interface are shown. A finger scrolls through settings like 'Auto Gain Control', 'Tone Presets (Bright, Regular, Rich)', and 'Track Modes (M, S, Q)'. (6) The transmitter is held next to a DJI Osmo Pocket 3 gimbal camera. The camera's screen displays a successful connection message with a green checkmark indicating 'Connected DJI Osmo Audio'. (7) The scene shifts outdoors to a city sidewalk with tall modern buildings and green trees in the background. The man is standing and gesturing enthusiastically as he speaks. The lighting is bright natural daylight with soft shadows on the ground. (8) A wide, long-distance shot of the urban pedestrian walkway is shown. A red arrow overlay points to the man standing far in the distance to demonstrate the wireless transmission range of the microphone while traffic and other pedestrians are faintly visible.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up of a hand holding a screwdriver, repeatedly stabbing and hitting a screen protector resting on a white cardboard base. Red graphic text with white outlines pulsates on screen. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the texture of the tool and the transparency of the film. (2) Medium shot of a middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap, wearing a black t-shirt with a white circle logo. He holds a screwdriver and looks into the camera with an exaggerated, wide-eyed expression of surprise. A yellow smartwatch is visible on his left wrist. (3) The camera switches back to a top-down view of the screwdriver impact, now with digital sparkling effects added to the points of contact. The man's hands are visible as he demonstrates the force being applied to the protector. (4) A product retail box for 'BESTSUIT D3O' is presented vertically. This is followed by a demonstration where a small orange circular material is placed on a table and a metal ball is dropped onto it, showing the material's reaction. (5) Several quick cuts show the man dropping a set of blue car keys, a silver coin, and a handful of metal screws onto the black surface of the screen protector. The objects bounce off the surface without causing visible damage or marks. (6) The man holds the translucent screen protector up to a bright overhead light source to demonstrate its clarity and lack of distortion. He then shows a close-up of the curved '2.5D' edges and pours water droplets onto the surface to exhibit hydrophobic 'beading' properties. (7) A brief shot of the installation kit is shown, including a manual with green accents, a green microfiber cloth, and adhesive strips. Finally, the man returns to the medium shot, pointing his finger downwards repeatedly toward the screen's bottom area.

(2) A male speaker enters with high vocal arousal and energetic projection, speaking Traditional Chinese at a rapid pace. His tone is enthusiastic and informative. Transition 'whoosh' sound effects are used between vocal phrases to punctuate cuts. (3) Sound of metal keys clinking and small screws rattling as they are dropped onto a surface. The speaker's pitch variability increases as he highlights product benefits, with audible 'ding' sound effects synchronized with visual text highlights. (4) Fluid sound of water splashing and droplets hitting a surface, followed by more metallic impacts. The BGM remains constant in volume and tempo, serving as a high-energy bed for the non-stop narration. (5) Final vocal segment with a slightly more authoritative but still friendly tone for the call to action. A final resonant 'ding' marks the end of the technical pitch before the BGM fades out abruptly with a hard cut.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a pink t-shirt, and a plaid hat stands on a busy Tokyo street corner during a bright, sunny day. He is speaking expressively with his hands while the iconic red and white Tokyo Tower towers in the background behind him. A cyclist in a grey shirt rides across the frame while pedestrians are visible in the distance. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of the man in the same pink t-shirt, featuring a prominent 'Roots' leaf logo, as he talks enthusiastically in a park-like setting with many green trees providing a soft, blurred background. He gestures frequently with his fingers to emphasize his points. (3) A series of graphic overlays appear, including a digital map showing the location of Akabanebashi Station and several static photo frames that feature the man and a young woman posing in front of the Tokyo Tower in broad daylight. The lighting remains bright and natural throughout this daytime sequence. (4) The setting transitions to a nighttime street scene where the man, still in his pink shirt and hat, stands near a crosswalk. The Tokyo Tower is beautifully illuminated in orange light behind him. He points toward a street sign and a parking lot entrance while talking to the camera under the glow of streetlights. (5) A young woman with long dark hair is seen inside a modern hotel room, wearing a pink top and sitting in a teal armchair by a large window. She gestures toward a breathtaking nighttime city view where the illuminated Tokyo Tower is the centerpiece. The room is softly lit, contrasting with the bright city lights outside. (6) A final collage of photographs displays both the man and the woman at various locations highlighted in the video. These images include shots from the street, the parking lot area, and the hotel room, shown in both daytime and nighttime lighting, showcasing different perspectives of the landmark tower.

Tim's voice remains the primary signal, describing the 10-year partnership milestone between Apple and Hermes. The music's volume is ducked slightly under his speech but maintains a consistent, driving rhythm. (3) A pop sound effect occurs simultaneously with variety text appearing on screen. Tim's pitch variability is high as he expresses excitement about the new rubber and woven designs. He speaks about the technical details with a rhythmic quality that aligns with the BGM tempo. (5) In the final segment, a red upward-trending arrow icon appears to illustrate rising prices and risks. The video concludes with the man offering a final piece of advice, his hands gesturing lower towards the screen as the background music fades and the graphics disappear, leaving just the speaker and his social media handle overlays.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log:
(1) The video opens with a middle-aged male host standing prominently in the foreground against a vibrant red backdrop. The background wall is covered with large white text in both Traditional Chinese and English titled "HERMÈS IN THE MAKING". He wears a structured grey blazer over a white t-shirt, a speckled grey newsboy cap, and rectangular glasses. His facial expression is welcoming and animated as he uses wide hand gestures to introduce the exhibition. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures of his clothing and the informative text behind him.
(2) The scene transitions to the interior of a spacious exhibition hall with exposed red brick walls and a high ceiling. A large, iconic tan Hermès leather bag is displayed inside a protective glass case on a pink-accented pedestal. The host playfully peeks out from behind a heavy red velvet curtain, adding a touch of personality to the tour. The background reveals a modern, industrial-chic setting with warm spotlighting focused on the exhibits. Various colorful Hermès bags are seen lined up on sleek wooden shelves attached to a red metal grid wall, showcasing a variety of hues from yellow to black.
(3) The camera focuses on a female artisan wearing glasses and a dark apron, seated at a specialized workbench. She uses a handheld burnishing tool to smooth the edges of a vibrant blue leather piece. Beside her, another person is seen in a partial frame, suggesting a collaborative environment. Close-up shots capture the detailed process of layering different materials for a bag's handle, demonstrating the precision required in leatherworking. The workspace is filled with professional tools and organized materials under soft, focused lighting.
(4) In the silk printing area, large, colorful Hermès scarves are suspended within circular yellow metal frames that rotate slowly, creating a dynamic visual display. A male craftsman dressed in a white lab-style coat is shown working at a large printing table, carefully applying ink through a screen onto a stretched white silk fabric. The surrounding environment is filled with large-scale digital displays and posters illustrating the scarf-making process. The host is also seen interacting with a large yellow kiosk featuring a touchscreen that displays intricate, evolving patterns as he presses large physical buttons.
(5) The narrative moves to glove and porcelain stations. A craftsman demonstrates the cutting patterns for gloves using a red template while explaining the process to an attentive female attendee. Another segment highlights a display of porcelain plates decorated with detailed blue leopard motifs set against tropical leaves. A close-up view shows a different artisan's hand using a fine-tipped brush to meticulously paint intricate lines on a large porcelain platter, emphasizing the brand's commitment to diverse artisanal crafts. The lighting in these areas is warm and evocative.
(6) Finally, the host is shown sitting on a large, bright yellow sculptural piece designed to resemble a stylized saddle. As he rocks back and forth, the object functions as a music box, with visible hammers striking metal bars to produce sound. In the background, a craftswoman in a leather apron is actively working on a traditional horse saddle, sewing and shaping the leather. The host concludes the video by sharing his impressions directly with the audience, still seated on the musical saddle, surrounded by the bustling energy of the exhibition hall.

(2) A sharp cut leads to a top-down close-up shot of the drone resting on a gray, pebble-textured ground. The drone's four rotors are clearly visible within their circular protective guards. The camera then cuts back to the man, who gives a thumbs-up and smiles broadly at the lens. He continues to hold the drone near his torso, showing its small scale relative to his body. (3) The setting shifts to a wider view of a paved plaza within the park. The man demonstrates gesture controls, standing several meters away from the camera. The drone hovers stably in the air at eye level. He raises a single hand to guide the drone's movement and then uses both hands to show how it can be pulled closer or pushed further away. The scene is bright with distinct shadows cast by the trees and the man on the ground. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the drone as it slowly descends and lands precisely on the man's open right palm. His hand is decorated with a wooden bead bracelet. The propellers stop spinning immediately upon contact. Finally, the camera returns to a medium close-up of the man, who talks enthusiastically while holding the drone. Variety-style text bubbles and graphic elements pop up around him to emphasize his points.
